```{r gt-export}
             "p value No Repair","p value Repair")) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title=md("**Charge Analysis: Repair vs No Repair**")) %>%
  tab_footnote(footnote=md(paste0(
    "Median (IQR) weighted national estimates. HCUP NASS 2016\u20132023. ",
    "Insurance type p-values: survey-weighted ANOVA on log-charges within ",
    "no-repair group and within repair group separately. Teaching status p-values: ",
    "survey-weighted t-test comparing Nonteaching vs Teaching within each group."))) %>%
  tab_style(style=cell_text(weight="bold"),
            locations=cells_body(
              rows=is.na(`No Repair Median`) &
                   !str_starts(Characteristic,"   "))) %>%
  tab_style(style=cell_fill(color="#EBF4FB"),
            locations=cells_column_labels()) %>%
  cols_label(Characteristic     ="Characteristic",
             `No Repair Median` ="No Repair Median (IQR)",
             `Repair Median`    ="Repair Median (IQR)",
             `p value No Repair`="p value (no repair: within-group)",
             `p value Repair`   ="p value (repair: within-group)") %>%
  opt_table_font(font="Arial") %>%
  tab_options(table.font.size=11, heading.title.font.size=12,
              column_labels.font.weight="bold",
              table.border.top.style="solid",
              table.border.bottom.style="solid")

# ── NIS 2023 gt ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
gt_nis <- nis_sheet %>%
  setNames(c("ICD-10-PCS Code","Description","Unweighted N","Weighted N")) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title=md("**NIS 2023 Facial Nerve Repair \u2014 Inpatient Database Results**"),
    subtitle=md("*HCUP National Inpatient Sample, 2023*")) %>%
  tab_footnote(footnote=md(paste0(
    "ICD-10-PCS codes searched in PNS section (01QM0/3/4ZZ) and CNS section ",
    "(00QM0/3/4ZZ). Individual PNS code breakdown suppressed per HCUP cell size ",
    "restrictions (<11 per cell). Weighted estimate uses NIS DISCWT. Finding ",
    "confirms facial nerve repair is predominantly ambulatory; NASS is the ",
    "appropriate primary database."))) %>%
  tab_style(style=list(cell_text(color="grey", style="italic")),
            locations=cells_body(rows=1:3)) %>%
  tab_style(style=list(cell_text(weight="bold"),
                       cell_fill(color="#EBF4FB")),
            locations=cells_body(rows=7)) %>%
  tab_style(style=cell_fill(color="#EBF4FB"),
            locations=cells_column_labels()) %>%
  sub_missing(missing_text="\u2014") %>%
  cols_label(`ICD-10-PCS Code`="ICD-10-PCS Code",
             Description="Description",
             `Unweighted N`="Unweighted N",
             `Weighted N`="Weighted N (national estimate)") %>%
  opt_table_font(font="Arial") %>%
  tab_options(table.font.size=11, heading.title.font.size=12,
              column_labels.font.weight="bold",
              table.border.top.style="solid",
              table.border.bottom.style="solid")

# ── Sensitivity Analysis 1 gt ────────────────────────────────────────────────
gt_sens1 <- sens1_tbl %>%
  setNames(c("Metric","Value")) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title=md("**Sensitivity Analysis 1 \u2014 Criterion A Only**")) %>%
  tab_footnote(footnote=md(paste0(
    "Group 1 restricted to S04.5 co-occurring with S01.* or S11.*, excluding ",
    "external-cause-only entries and excluding the Criterion B procedural ",
    "pathway. HCUP NASS 2016\u20132023. Weighted estimates use DISCWT."))) %>%
  tab_style(style=cell_fill(color="#EBF4FB"),
            locations=cells_column_labels()) %>%
  cols_label(Metric="Metric", Value="Value") %>%
  opt_table_font(font="Arial") %>%
  tab_options(table.font.size=11, heading.title.font.size=12,
              column_labels.font.weight="bold",
              table.border.top.style="solid",
              table.border.bottom.style="solid")

# ── Sensitivity Analysis 2 gt ────────────────────────────────────────────────
gt_sens2 <- sens2_tbl %>%
  setNames(c("Metric","Value")) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title=md("**Sensitivity Analysis 2 \u2014 Highest Mechanistic Specificity**")) %>%
  tab_footnote(footnote=md(paste0(
    "Group 1 restricted to S04.5 co-occurring with S01.* or S11.* AND an ",
    "external cause code (W25\u2013W27, W45, X99, Y28, V01\u2013V99). ",
    "HCUP NASS 2016\u20132023. Weighted estimates use DISCWT."))) %>%
  tab_style(style=cell_fill(color="#EBF4FB"),
            locations=cells_column_labels()) %>%
  cols_label(Metric="Metric", Value="Value") %>%
  opt_table_font(font="Arial") %>%
  tab_options(table.font.size=11, heading.title.font.size=12,
              column_labels.font.weight="bold",
              table.border.top.style="solid",
              table.border.bottom.style="solid")

# ── Save all Word tables ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
save_gt_to_word(gt_sheet1, "Table1_Patient_Characteristics.docx")
save_gt_to_word(gt_sheet2, "Table2_Logistic_Regression.docx")
save_gt_to_word(gt_sheet4, "Table4_Repair_Rates_by_Year.docx")
save_gt_to_word(gt_sheet5, "Table5_Charges_Analysis.docx")
save_gt_to_word(gt_nis,    "Table_NIS2023_Inpatient_Results.docx")
save_gt_to_word(gt_sens1,  "Table_Sensitivity_Analysis_1.docx")
save_gt_to_word(gt_sens2,  "Table_Sensitivity_Analysis_2.docx")

message("\nAll Word tables saved to: ", word_dir)
```

# Draft Methods Paragraph

```{r draft-methods}
#| cache: false
g1_unw_fmt   <- format(nrow(enc_all),                  big.mark=",")
g1_w_fmt     <- format(round(total_g1_w),              big.mark=",")
g2_w_fmt     <- format(round(total_repair_w),          big.mark=",")
g3_w_fmt     <- format(round(total_norepair_w),        big.mark=",")
rate_pct     <- round(100*total_repair_w/total_g1_w,   1)
norate_pct   <- round(100*total_norepair_w/total_g1_w, 1)

draft_methods <- paste0(
  "We analyzed the HCUP National Ambulatory Surgery Sample (NASS) for 2016 ",
  "through 2023. A total of ", g1_w_fmt, " encounters with traumatic facial ",
  "nerve laceration were identified nationally (unweighted N = ", g1_unw_fmt,
  "), of whom ", g2_w_fmt, " (", rate_pct, "%) underwent surgical repair ",
  "(CPT 64864 or 64865). ", g3_w_fmt, " patients (", norate_pct,
  "%) were managed without operative repair."
)

cat(draft_methods)
```

# Copy Outputs to OneDrive

```{r copy-to-drive}
#| cache: false
# Copy the rendered HTML and the .qmd source into the Quarto Versions subfolder.
qmd_basename  <- "nass_phase2_analysis_1_0.qmd"
html_basename <- "nass_phase2_analysis_1_0.html"

# HTML: search common locations for the rendered output
html_candidates <- c(
  file.path(getwd(),     html_basename),
  file.path("~/Downloads", html_basename),
  file.path("~/Documents", html_basename)
)
html_src <- html_candidates[file.exists(path.expand(html_candidates))][1]
if (!is.na(html_src)) {
  file.copy(path.expand(html_src),
            file.path(qmd_dir, html_basename),
            overwrite=TRUE)
  message("HTML copied from: ", html_src)
} else {
  message("HTML not yet available; render the document and re-run this chunk.")
}

# QMD source: copy from the working directory if present
qmd_src <- file.path(getwd(), "nass_phase2_analysis_1_0.qmd")
qmd_dst <- file.path(qmd_dir, "nass_phase2_analysis_1_0.qmd")
if (file.exists(qmd_src) && normalizePath(qmd_src) != normalizePath(qmd_dst)) {
  file.copy(qmd_src, qmd_dst, overwrite=TRUE)
  message("QMD copied to Quarto Versions: ", qmd_dir)
} else {
  message("QMD is already in Quarto Versions — no copy needed.")
}

message("\nAll outputs saved under: ", output_dir)
message("  Figures      : ", fig_dir)
message("  Excel        : ", xlsx_dir)
message("  Word Tables  : ", word_dir)
message("  Quarto       : ", qmd_dir)
```

# Session Info

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
